client: Glamnetic (glamnetic.com — live production store, Shopify shop glamrco.myshopify.com)
frontend: Gorgias Chat (AI-powered) — WebSocket; conversation rendered in same-origin chat-window iframe
metric: send -> reply rendered in chat-window iframe (textContent growth + stability, typing-indicator aware)
note: Unlike the previous NouriVida demo, Glamnetic is a REAL production storefront with a full catalog and production guardrails — a fairer, tougher test than a sales-tuned demo. Gina renders interactive Add-to-Cart product cards, makes specific multi-item and cross-category recommendations (nails -> matching lash -> liner), reasons about bundles, and is honest about limits (won't add to cart, no shipping ETA in chat). On support it gives specific policy answers but gates order-specific actions behind account login, and escalates to a human only when explicitly asked.
session_caveat: Warm session: the store carried a prior April-14 conversation that had been handled by a HUMAN agent ('Krista') and auto-closed. Shopping turns 1-3 latency is contaminated by that warm-history load + detector tuning; clean latencies are shopping T4-T10 and all support turns. A guaranteed-cold run needs a fresh browser profile/container (see docs/METHODOLOGY.md).

results.q: New to press-on nails, weak/short natural nails — which sets last longest and won't damage my nails?
results.a: Glue-on press-ons last up to 2 weeks; for weak/short nails use nail tabs not glue (gentler, easier removal); start with a short shape. (latency warm-load contaminated)

results.q: I love a natural, neutral look — which is most natural and beginner-friendly?
results.a: Ma Damn — classic short almond, semi-transparent base + white French tip; polished without being flashy. (warm)

results.q: How long does Ma Damn last + how to apply/remove safely on weak nails?
results.a: Up to 2 weeks. Apply: small amount of glue, avoid skin, press 10s, prep cuticles + buff. Remove: soak in warm water + oil + soap 10-15 min, lift from sides, never pry. (detector-retune)

results.q: Small/narrow nails — how do I make sure Ma Damn fits?
results.a: Short Almond ~6.3-14.01mm; 24 nails / 12 sizes (numbered), file sides to fit; test each nail sidewall-to-sidewall before applying; can send a photo for fit help.

results.q: Do I need anything else — prep kit, glue, nail tabs?
results.a: Set includes glue/alcohol pad/file/cuticle stick. Adhesive Nail Tabs gentler for weak nails; Brush-On Glue easiest. Best beginner kit: Pressed to Perfection bundle.

results.q: Total for Ma Damn + Pressed to Perfection, and a first-order discount?
results.a: $32.17 before tax/shipping; 20% new-customer offer link, but no first-order code confirmed in chat and no auto-discounts apply.

results.q: How fast is US shipping, and free shipping on both items?
results.a: 'I don't have the US shipping timing or free-shipping threshold confirmed here yet.' — deflects back to products.
results.limitation: no shipping ETA / threshold in the buy flow

results.q: Add Ma Damn and the bundle to my cart?
results.a: Can't add to cart directly; surfaces the cards (add from each page) + checkout quick-replies.
results.limitation: cannot add to cart for the user

results.q: A magnetic lash to match this soft natural look?
results.a: Virgo — most natural magnetic lash; needs a magnetic liner (sold separately); offers liner options as chips.

results.q: Classic black liner + checkout + 20% offer?
results.a: Magnetic Eyeliner Pen in Black $27.99 (in stock); open cards -> add -> checkout from cart; 20% new-customer offer link; offers to line up the full set.

support.handover: Answered all 9 substantive support questions itself (policy answers or auth-gated lookups). Offered a human handover (email capture, ~1 min) ONLY when the user explicitly asked for a human — appropriate escalation, NOT an unprompted refusal.

results.q: Order placed days ago, no tracking — how long to ship + send tracking?
results.a: Ships within 48 business hours; tracking on dispatch; US standard 3-7 business days; flag if no confirmation within 5 business days.

results.q: Return policy — can I return opened press-on nails?
results.a: 14 days, original condition + packaging only; opened/used not eligible; refund (-$8 return shipping) or gift card (no fee); refunds in 3-5 business days.

results.q: Nails arrived broken in the box — what do you do?
results.a: Damaged-item issue (not a standard return); defers to login/order lookup for next steps.

results.q: Change shipping address on an order placed this morning?
results.a: Possible if not yet shipped; needs login to check + update if eligible.

results.q: Cancel an order shortly after placing? Cancellation window?
results.a: Processed in 24-48h; cancellation only before fulfilment; login to check.

results.q: Ship to Canada? Who covers customs/duties?
results.a: Ships to Canada (8-14 business days); customs/duties paid by customer; possible 25% tariff on certain US-origin products + ~5-15% duty over $150 CAD; free standard shipping over $65 USD.

results.q: Discount code won't apply at checkout — reasons + fix?
results.a: Expired / excluded items / minimum not met / another promo applied; enter exactly, meet terms, remove other codes; offers to check the specific code + cart.

results.q: Cruelty-free and vegan? I have sensitive eyes/skin.
results.a: Cruelty-free (nails + lashes); press-on nails vegan; nail tabs gentler than glue (ethyl cyanoacrylate + PMMA); offers sensitive-eye lash help.

results.q: Tracking says delivered but never arrived — refund or replacement?
results.a: Empathetic; defers to login/order lookup (no general policy before auth).

results.q: Can I just talk to a human?
results.a: Loops in a teammate + email-capture form (~1 min).
results.note: handover ONLY on explicit request — appropriate

features: Interactive Add-to-Cart product cards (image + price + cart button), specific multi-item and cross-category recommendations, bundle reasoning, quick-reply chips, account-gated order lookups, thumbs up/down feedback. Honest about limits (won't add to cart for you, no in-chat shipping ETA).
limitations: Slower than the NouriVida demo (~20s vs ~17s shopping)
No in-chat shipping ETA / free-shipping threshold
Can't add items to the cart for the shopper
Order-specific support gated behind account login
